datasets.name: NOAA GOES-17
datasets.description: GOES-West geostationary satellite imagery covering the Western US and Pacific

datasets.name: NOAA GOES-16
datasets.description: GOES-East, covers Eastern US and Atlantic

datasets.name: NOAA GOES-18
datasets.description: GOES-West geostationary satellite imagery covering the Western US and Pacific

datasets.name: NIH NCBI Sequence Read Archive
datasets.description: raw DNA sequencing data and alignment information from high-throughput sequencing platforms

datasets.name: NEXRAD
datasets.description: network of 160 high-resolution Doppler radar sites that detects precipitation and atmospheric movement and disseminates data

datasets.name: SpaceNet
datasets.description: imagery with co-registered map features. Before SpaceNet, computer vision researchers had minimal options to obtain free, precision-labeled, and high-resolution satellite imagery

datasets.name: Image classification - fast.ai datasets
datasets.description: Some of the most important datasets for image classification research, including CIFAR 10 and 100, Caltech 101, MNIST, Food-101, Oxford-102-Flowers, Oxford-IIIT-Pets, and Stanford-Cars

datasets.name: OpenAlex
datasets.description: An open, comprehensive index of scolarly papers, citations, authors, institutions, and journals.
